title: adhatoda flava
intro: Adhatoda flava, also known as Vasaka or Malabar nut, is a plant species that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Adhatoda flava include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Adhatoda flava can be made into teas, infusions, and capsules, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions.
